info.name: Dllni - User Module (Merged)
info.description:
## Base URL & prefix
- Collection variable `{{baseUrl}}` defaults to `http://Dllni.test` (Herd/Laragon).
- User API base path: `/api/v1/user` (routes file: `Modules/User/routes/api.php`).

## Authentication
- **Public**: register, login OTP steps, reset password, supermarket/restaurant discovery, **restaurant home** (categories, exclusive offers, suggested products, nearest restaurants), products, marketing offers, vote read, luck box, etc.
- **Sanctum**: set `{{token}}` from verify/login/reset responses; send `Authorization: Bearer {{token}}` for `me`, `account`, `addresses`, **favorites** (restaurants + supermarket stores + supermarket products), `notifications`, cart, checkout, orders, **restaurants/home/latest-ordered-products**, supermarket **items CRUD**, supermarket order status, vote create/ballot/end.

## Favorites â€” Ø§Ù„Ù…ÙØ¶Ù„Ø© (authenticated)
Polymorphic rows in `favorites` (`favorable_type` = `Restaurant`, `SmStore`, or supermarket product morph type). List order: **most recently favorited first** (`favorites.created_at` desc).

| Path | Method | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `/api/v1/user/favorites/restaurants` | GET | Paginated `RestaurantResource`; query `perPage` (1â€“100, default 20), `page` |
| `/api/v1/user/favorites/restaurants/{id}` | POST | No body. **201** first add, **200** if already favorited. Body: `{ "restaurant": â€¦ }`. **422** if restaurant not active. |
| `/api/v1/user/favorites/restaurants/{id}` | DELETE | **204** empty body (safe if not favorited). |
| `/api/v1/user/favorites/supermarket/stores` | GET | Paginated `SmStoreResource`; `perPage`, `page` |
| `/api/v1/user/favorites/supermarket/stores/{id}` | POST | **201** / **200**; `{ "store": â€¦ }`. **422** if store inactive. |
| `/api/v1/user/favorites/supermarket/stores/{id}` | DELETE | **204** |
| `/api/v1/user/favorites/supermarket/products` | GET | Paginated `SmProductResource`; `perPage`, `page` |
| `/api/v1/user/favorites/supermarket/products/{id}` | POST | **201** / **200**; `{ "product": â€¦ }`. **422** if product unavailable or store inactive. |
| `/api/v1/user/favorites/supermarket/products/{id}` | DELETE | **204** |

## Restaurant homepage (`GET /api/v1/user/restaurants/home/*`)
| Route | Auth | Purpose |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `.../categories` | No | Cuisine types that have â‰¥1 **active** restaurant |
| `.../exclusive-offers` | No | Active offers on active restaurants; optional `latitude`, `longitude`, `limit` |
| `.../suggested-products` | No | Featured / highly rated menu items; `limit` |
| `.../nearest-restaurants` | No | Near-user list; optional `latitude`, `longitude`, `limit`; `isFavorited` true only with Bearer token |
| `.../latest-ordered-products` | **Yes** | Distinct products from userâ€™s non-cancelled orders (reorder / Ø§Ø·Ù„Ø¨ Ù…Ø¬Ø¯Ø¯Ø§Ù‹); `limit` |

**Distance**: Haversine runs on MySQL/Postgres, etc. **SQLite** (`phpunit`) does not compute `distanceKm` (values `null`).

## Success status codes (typical)
- `200` â€” OK (JSON body).
- `201` â€” Created (addresses, cart item, checkout order, group vote, first-time favorite add for restaurant/store).
- `204` â€” No content (delete address).
- `404` â€” Not found (invalid id, inactive marketing offer, wrong userâ€™s resource).
- `403` / `401` â€” Forbidden / Unauthenticated (missing or invalid token).
- `422` â€” Validation errors: `{ "message": "...", "errors": { "field": ["..."] } }`.

## Pagination (Laravel)
- Paginated resources return `data` (array of items), `links` (`first`, `last`, `prev`, `next`), and `meta` (`current_page`, `from`, `last_page`, `path`, `per_page`, `to`, `total`, â€¦).
- Query: `page`, `perPage` (camelCase in this API where FormRequest defines it).

## Media in JSON (summary)
- **Restaurant** `RestaurantResource`: `primaryImage`, `image`, `banner`, `images`.
- **Restaurant product** `ProductResource`: `primaryImage`, `images`.
- **User** `UserResource` (with `media` loaded): `primaryImage` / `images` as `MediaResource` objects (`url`, `thumbnailUrl`, â€¦).
- **Marketing offers**: `imageUrl` (Spatie `card-image`) or `null`.
- **Supermarket** `SmStoreResource`: `cover`, `logo`; luck-box line items: `imageUrl`.
- **Supermarket order** items: product media via `SmProductResource` when loaded.

## Flow overview
### Register + verify
1. `POST /register` â†’ OTP sent.
2. `POST /verify-account` â†’ `user` + `token`.

### Login (SMS OTP)
1. `POST /login` â†’ OTP sent.
2. `POST /login/verify` â†’ `user` + `token`.

### Reset password
1. `POST /reset-password` â†’ generic message; `expiresAt` null if phone unknown.
2. `POST /reset-password/confirm` â†’ `message` + `token`.

## Examples in this collection
Each request includes a **saved example** (`Examples` in Postman) with a representative **200/201/204** JSON body. Adjust ids and tokens to your environment.

## Notes
- SMS/OTP is behind a provider interface.



## Props Format (Request / Response Contract)
- Path params: {id} in docs and {{id}} as Postman variables.
- Query props: camelCase unless endpoint docs explicitly use snake_case.
- Body props: required first, optional props marked and can be null when allowed.
- Pagination shape: data, links, meta.
- Validation errors (422): { "message": string, "errors": { "field": [string] } }.

## Common Enums
- orderType: delivery | pickup
- pickupMode: immediate_pickup | scheduled_pickup
- discover sort: rating | nearest | fastest
- vote status: active | ended
- luck-box label: best_value | fastest | balanced

## What Endpoints Return
- List endpoints: paginated data[] with links and meta (unless noted otherwise).
- Show endpoints: single object (sometimes wrapped in data).
- Create endpoints: 201 with created payload.
- Update endpoints: 200 with updated payload.
- Delete endpoints: 204 with empty body.

request.description:
Creates a new user and sends an SMS OTP for account verification.

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Response body**:
| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `message` | string | Arabic confirmation that OTP was sent |
| `expiresAt` | string (ISO 8601) | OTP expiry time |

**Errors**: `422` validation on `name`, `email`, `phone`, `password`.

Verifies the registration OTP, marks the account as verified, and returns a Sanctum token.

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Response body**:
| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `user` | object | `UserResource` (see `me` example; media keys appear only if loaded) |
| `token` | string | Sanctum `plainTextToken` â€” save as `{{token}}` |

**Errors**: `422` invalid OTP / phone.

Checks password, then sends an SMS OTP for login.

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Response**: same shape as register OTP (`message`, `expiresAt`).

**Errors**: `422` wrong password (`phone` message) or invalid phone.

Verifies the login OTP and returns a Sanctum token.

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Response**: `user` + `token` (same as verify-account).

Sends an OTP if the phone exists (response is intentionally generic).

**Status**: `200 OK` always for privacy.

**Response**:
- `message` â€” Arabic generic text
- `expiresAt` â€” ISO 8601 if user found; **`null`** if phone not registered

response.name: 200 OK â€” generic (user exists)

request.description:
Verifies OTP, resets password, and returns a token.

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Response**:
- `message` â€” Arabic success
- `token` â€” new Sanctum token (previous `user-api` tokens revoked)

Current authenticated user with `media` loaded.

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Headers**: `Authorization: Bearer {{token}}`

**Response**:
- `user` â€” `UserResource`: `id`, `name`, `email`, `phone`, `phoneVerifiedAt`, `moduleType`, `emailVerifiedAt`, `primaryImage` / `images` (when media present), `createdAt`, `updatedAt`

Account hub: same `user` as `me` (with `media`) plus unread notification count.

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Headers**: `Authorization: Bearer {{token}}`

**Response**:
- `user` â€” `UserResource`
- `unreadNotificationsCount` â€” integer

Partial profile update (JSON).

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Headers**: `Authorization`, `Content-Type: application/json`

**Body** (all optional): `name`, `phone` â€” changing `phone` clears `phoneVerifiedAt` until re-verified.

**Response**: `{ "user": UserResource }`

For photo upload use **Update account (multipart)** with field `primaryImage`.

PATCH with `multipart/form-data`: text fields `name`, `phone` plus file `primaryImage` (image mime, max size per `UserAccountUpdateRequest`).

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Response**: `{ "user": UserResource }` â€” `primaryImage` populated after upload.

Change password.

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Body**: `currentPassword`, `newPassword`, `newPasswordConfirmation` (must match).

**Response**: `{ "message": "Password updated successfully." }`

Paginated `database` notifications (`UserNotificationResource`).

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Query**: `perPage` (default 10), `page`, `filter[unread]=1` for unread only.

**Response**: Laravel pagination; each `data[]` item: `id`, `type`, `title`, `body`, `data` (optional `bookingId`, `timeWarningId`, `disputeId`), `readAt`, `createdAt`.

response.name: 200 OK â€” notifications page

request.description:
List saved addresses for the user.

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Response**:
- `addresses` â€” array of `UserAddressResource` (`id`, `label`, `mobile`, `city`, `neighborhood`, `street`, `building`, `floor`, `directions`, `latitude`, `longitude`, `isDefault`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt`). Default address first.

Single address payload for the edit screen.

**Status**: `200 OK` | `404`

Partial update; at least one field is required. To change default, send `isDefault: true/false`.

**Status**: `200 OK` | `422` | `404`

Create address.

**Status**: `201 Created`

**Body**: `label` + at least one detail field (`mobile`, `city`, `neighborhood`, `street`, `building`, `floor`, `directions`); optional `isDefault`, `latitude`, `longitude`.

**Response**: `{ "address": UserAddressResource }`

Replace address (PUT). Route model `userAddress` scoped to auth user.

**Status**: `200 OK` | `404`

**Response**: `{ "address": UserAddressResource }`

PATCH â€” set this address as the only default.

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Response**: `{ "address": UserAddressResource }` with `isDefault: true`.

Delete address.

**Status**: `204 No Content` â€” empty body.

If the deleted address was default, another address (lowest id) becomes default.

Paginated favorite **restaurants** for the authenticated user (`RestaurantResource`, same shape as discover).

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Query**: `perPage`, `page`.

**Order**: Newest favorite first (by `favorites.created_at`).

response.name: 200 OK â€” favorites page

request.description:
Add an **active** restaurant to favorites (idempotent).

**Status**: `201 Created` on first add | `200 OK` if already favorited

**Response**: `{ "restaurant": RestaurantResource }` (media, `cuisineTypes`, `primaryActiveOffer` loaded).

**Errors**: `401`, `404` (invalid id), `422` if `is_active` is false (message: restaurant not available).

Remove a restaurant from favorites.

**Status**: `204 No Content` â€” empty body (also when it was not favorited).

Paginated favorite **supermarket stores** (`SmStoreResource` with `owner` loaded).

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Query**: `perPage`, `page`.

response.name: 200 OK â€” store favorites

request.description:
Add an **active** supermarket store to favorites (idempotent).

**Status**: `201` first add | `200` if already favorited

**Response**: `{ "store": SmStoreResource }` (`owner` loaded).

**Errors**: `422` if store inactive (message: store not available).

Remove a supermarket store from favorites.

**Status**: `204 No Content`.

Paginated favorite supermarket products for the authenticated user (`SmProductResource`).

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Query**: `perPage`, `page`.

**Order**: newest favorite first (by `favorites.created_at`).

Add an available supermarket product from an active store to favorites (idempotent).

**Status**: `201` first add | `200` if already favorited

**Response**: `{ "product": SmProductResource }`.

**Errors**: `422` if product unavailable or store inactive.

Remove a supermarket product from favorites.

**Status**: `204 No Content`.

Platform marketing offers (paginated `UserMarketingOfferResource`). Public.

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Query**: `perPage`, `page`.

**Response**: `data[]` with `id`, `title`, `description`, `خصمLabel`, `promoCode`, `startsAt`, `endsAt`, `theme`, `sortOrder`, **`imageUrl`**, `createdAt`, `updatedAt`.

**Media**: `imageUrl` from Spatie `card-image` or `null`.

response.name: 200 OK â€” offers page

request.description:
Single valid marketing offer (route binding applies `currentlyValid()` scope).

**Status**: `200 OK` | `404` if inactive or outside window.

**Response**: wrapped `data` object (single `UserMarketingOfferResource`).
Marks one authenticated user notification as read. Returns 204 No Content.

body.raw: {"message":"تمت مراجعة الشكوى وسيتم المتابعة مع الدعم."}

request.description:
Estimate cleaning size and service hours based on property details.

**Status**: `200 OK` | `422` validation error

**Headers**: `Authorization: Bearer {{token}}`

**Body**:
- `propertyType` (required): `apartment` | `villa` | `house` | `office`
- `estimatedSqm` (optional): Square meters
- `rooms` (optional): Total rooms count
- `bedrooms` (optional): Bedrooms count
- `bathrooms` (optional): Bathrooms count

**Response**:
```json
{
  "data": {
    "estimatedSqm": 120,
    "sizeCategory": "medium",
    "estimatedHours": 3.5,
    "hoursRange": { "min": 3, "max": 4 },
    "suggestedServices": ["standard_cleaning", "window_cleaning"],
    "priceEstimate": 875
  }
}
```

Get list of workers who have provided cleaning services for the authenticated user (for re-booking/favorite workers).

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Headers**: `Authorization: Bearer {{token}}`

**Query**:
- `limit` (optional, default 10): Max workers to return (1–100)
- `page` (optional, default 1): Pagination page

**Response**: Paginated worker list with details.
```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "id": 42,
      "name": "محمد أحمد",
      "phone": "+963944123456",
      "rating": 4.8,
      "totalJobs": 15,
      "completedJobs": 14,
      "isFavorited": true,
      "lastServiceDate": "2026-03-28",
      "profileImage": "https://...",
      "badges": ["verified", "top_rated"]
    }
  ],
  "links": { "first": "...", "last": "...", "prev": null, "next": "..." },
  "meta": { "current_page": 1, "from": 1, "last_page": 1, "per_page": 10, "to": 5, "total": 5 }
}
```

response.name: 200 OK - Previous Workers List
response.body: {"data": [{"id": 42, "name": "محمد أحمد", "phone": "+963944123456", "rating": 4.8, "totalJobs": 15, "completedJobs": 14, "isFavorited": true, "lastServiceDate": "2026-03-28", "profileImage": "https://example.com/worker.jpg", "badges": ["verified", "top_rated"]}, {"id": 43, "name": "فاطمة علي", "phone": "+963944789012", "rating": 4.6, "totalJobs": 8, "completedJobs": 8, "isFavorited": false, "lastServiceDate": "2026-03-15", "profileImage": "https://example.com/worker2.jpg", "badges": ["verified"]}], "links": {"first": "http://Dllni.test/api/v1/user/cleaning/orders/previous-workers?page=1", "last": "http://Dllni.test/api/v1/user/cleaning/orders/previous-workers?page=1", "prev": null, "next": null}, "meta": {"current_page": 1, "from": 1, "last_page": 1, "per_page": 10, "to": 2, "total": 2}}

request.description:
Calculate detailed price estimate for a cleaning order based on property and service details.

**Status**: `200 OK` | `422` validation error

**Headers**: `Authorization: Bearer {{token}}`

**Body**:
- `propertyType` (required): `apartment` | `villa` | `house` | `office`
- `estimatedSqm` (required): Square meters
- `totalHours` (required): Estimated hours (decimal)
- `serviceType` (required): `standard_cleaning` | `deep_cleaning` | `move_cleaning`
- `addons` (optional): Array of addon service codes
- `scheduledDate` (required): Date in YYYY-MM-DD format
- `addressLatitude` (required): Latitude for travel fee calculation
- `addressLongitude` (required): Longitude for travel fee calculation
- `preferredWorkerId` (optional): Specific worker ID for re-booking

**Response**:
```json
{
  "data": {
    "basePrice": 750,
    "addonsTotal": 125,
    "travelFee": 75,
    "taxes": 0,
    "discounts": 0,
    "totalPrice": 950,
    "currency": "IQD",
    "breakdown": {
      "hourlyRate": 150,
      "sqmRate": 0,
      "minimumCharge": false
    },
    "paymentMethods": ["wallet", "card", "cash"]
  }
}
```

Restaurant app home: horizontal cuisine chips / filters.

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Response**:
- `categories` â€” `{ id, name, slug, image, imageUrl }[]` â€” only `CuisineType` rows linked to at least one **`is_active`** restaurant, sorted by `name`.
- `image` / `imageUrl` are derived from the first active linked restaurant primary image when available.

**Controller**: `UserRestaurantHomeCategoriesController` â†’ `UserRestaurantHomeCategoriesService`.

Returns only available products that currently have active offers, optionally scoped to one restaurant.

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Query**:
- `per_page` (1–100, default 15)
- `restaurant_id` (optional)

**Response**:
- paginated `data[]` of `UserRestaurantProductWithOffersResource` including `activeOffers[]` details.

response.name: 200 OK — products with offers

request.description:
Returns available products in a specific category with active offer details.

**Status**: `200 OK` | `404` category not found

**Query**: `per_page` (1–100, default 15).

query.description: Optional; with longitude enables distance sort + distanceKm
Optional; with latitude enables distance sort + distanceKm

request.description:
Home section Â«Ø¹Ø±ÙˆØ¶ Ø­ØµØ±ÙŠØ© Ø¨Ø§Ù„Ù‚Ø±Ø¨ Ù…Ù†ÙƒÂ»: one card per **active offer** on an **active** restaurant.

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Query** (optional): `latitude`, `longitude`, `limit` (1â€“30, default 15).

**Response**:
- `exclusiveOffers[]` â€” `UserRestaurantExclusiveOfferResource`:
  - `offerId`, `restaurantId`, `restaurantName`
  - `offerBadgeText` â€” e.g. `20%` from خصم rules
  - `offerDescription` â€” offer `name` (detail line)
  - `خصمType`, `خصمValue`
  - `urgencyTag` â€” `limited_time` | `ending_soon` | `todays_offer` | `null` (`Offer::listingUrgencyTag()`)
  - `distanceKm`, `distanceUnit` (`km` when distance computed)
  - `imageUrl` â€” restaurant primary image
  - `restaurant`: `{ id, name, district, city }`
  - `products[]`: `{ productId, name, displayPrice, originalPrice, currency, primaryImageUrl }`

**422**: invalid query params.

response.name: 200 OK â€” exclusive offers
response.body:
{
  "exclusiveOffers": [
    {
      "offerId": 12,
      "restaurantId": 3,
      "restaurantName": "Pizza Place",
      "offerBadgeText": "50%",

      "restaurant": {
        "id": 3,
        "name": "Pizza Place",
        "district": "Al-Mazzeh",
        "city": "Damascus"
      },
      "products": [
        {
          "productId": 101,
          "name": "Family Margherita",
          "displayPrice": 12000,
          "originalPrice": 24000,
          "currency": "IQD",
          "primaryImageUrl": "https://example.test/storage/media/p101/primary.jpg"
        },
        {
          "productId": 102,
          "name": "Family Pepperoni",
          "displayPrice": 15000,
          "originalPrice": 30000,
          "currency": "IQD",
          "primaryImageUrl": "https://example.test/storage/media/p102/primary.jpg"
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}

request.description:
Home Â«Ù…Ù‚ØªØ±Ø­ Ù„ÙƒÂ»: curated dishes (featured product + highly rated restaurant), not personalized by taste yet.

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Query**: `limit` (1â€“30, default 15).

**Response**:
- `suggestedProducts[]` â€” `UserRestaurantSuggestedProductResource`:
  - `productId`, `name`, `rating` (restaurant `average_rating`, 1 decimal)
  - `displayPrice`, `originalPrice` (when خصمed)
  - `currency` â€” `config('app.currency', 'IQD')`
  - `primaryImageUrl`
  - `restaurant`: `{ id, name, district, city }`
  - `tags[]`: `{ name, slug, kind }` â€” `menu_category` and/or `cuisine` (deduped by slug)

**422**: invalid `limit`.

header.description: Optional â€” when set, `isFavorited` reflects `favorites` morph for Restaurant

query.description: Optional; with longitude enables distance ordering + distanceKm
Optional; with latitude enables distance ordering + distanceKm

request.description:
Home Â«Ù…Ø·Ø§Ø¹Ù… Ù‚Ø±ÙŠØ¨Ø© Ù…Ù†ÙƒÂ»: restaurant cards with rating, cuisines, ETA window, optional خصم ribbon, popularity flag.

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Query** (optional): `latitude`, `longitude`, `limit` (1â€“30, default 15).

**Headers** (optional): `Authorization: Bearer {{token}}` â€” if authenticated, `isFavorited` is resolved from `favorites` (`favorable_type` = `Restaurant`).

**Response**:
- `nearestRestaurants[]` â€” `UserRestaurantNearestRestaurantResource`:
  - `id`, `name`, `slug`, `rating`
  - `primaryImageUrl`
  - `cuisineNames[]`, `cuisineSummary` (names joined with ` â€¢ `)
  - `distanceKm`, `distanceUnit`
  - `estimatedDeliveryMinutesMin`, `estimatedDeliveryMinutesMax` (from `estimated_preparation_time` Â± buffer)
  - `خصمOfferBadge` â€” from primary active offer badge text or `null`
  - `isMostRequested` â€” `true` if â‰¥5 **completed/picked_up** orders in last **30 days**
  - `popularOrdersCount`
  - `isFavorited`
  - `deliveryFee`, `isFreeDelivery` â€” currently **`null`** (no DB column yet); `currency` for future use

Without coordinates (or on SQLite tests): sort by featured + rating; `distanceKm` often `null`.

response.name: 200 OK â€” nearest restaurants
response.body:
{
  "nearestRestaurants": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "name": "Italian Chef Restaurant",
      "slug": "italian-chef",
      "rating": 4.5,
      "primaryImageUrl": "https://example.test/storage/media/r1/primary.jpg",
      "cuisineNames": ["Italian", "Pizza", "Pasta"],
      "cuisineSummary": "Italian â€¢ Pizza â€¢ Pasta",
      "distanceKm": 1.2,
      "distanceUnit": "km",
      "estimatedDeliveryMinutesMin": 20,
      "estimatedDeliveryMinutesMax": 40,
      "خصمOfferBadge": "20%",
      "isMostRequested": true,
      "popularOrdersCount": 12,
      "isFavorited": false,
      "deliveryFee": null,
      "isFreeDelivery": null,
      "currency": "IQD"
    }
  ]
}

request.description:
Home Â«Ø§Ø·Ù„Ø¨ Ù…Ø¬Ø¯Ø¯Ø§Ù‹Â» / reorder: distinct products from the userâ€™s **non-cancelled** restaurant orders, newest first (one row per `productId`).

**Status**: `200 OK` | **`401`** without valid Sanctum token

**Query**: `limit` (1â€“30, default 15).

**Response**:
- `latestOrderedProducts[]` â€” `UserRestaurantLatestOrderedProductResource`:
  - `productId`, `productName`, `restaurantId`, `restaurantName`
  - `displayPrice` â€” **current** catalog price (respects `خصمed_price`)
  - `originalPrice` â€” when on خصم
  - `lastOrderedLineUnitPrice` â€” historical unit price from the order line
  - `currency`
  - `primaryImageUrl`
  - `lastOrderId`, `lastOrderedAt` (`completed_at` or order `created_at`)

Excludes **unavailable** products and **inactive** restaurants. **422**: invalid `limit`.

Discover restaurants (paginated `RestaurantResource`).

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Query**: `perPage`, `search`, `sort` = `rating` | `nearest` | `fastest`, `filter[openNow]`, `filter[hasOffers]`, `latitude`, `longitude` (needed for `nearest`).

**Media**: `primaryImage`, `image`, `banner`, `images` per restaurant.

response.name: 200 OK â€” discover page

request.description:
Restaurant details (composite JSON, not a single API Resource).

**Status**: `200 OK` | `404`

**Query**: `reviewsPerPage` (default 10).

**Top-level keys**:
- `restaurant` â€” `RestaurantResource`
- `offers` â€” `OfferResource[]`
- `popularProducts` â€” `ProductResource[]`
- `categories` â€” `CategoryResource[]` (with nested `products`)
- `ratingSummary` â€” `{ average, total, counts: { "1".."5" } }`
- `reviews` â€” paginated `ReviewResource` (`data`, `links`, `meta` when paginator passed)

Restaurant product detail + modifier groups for bottom sheet.

**Status**: `200 OK` | `404` if unavailable.

**Response**:
- `product` â€” `ProductResource` (`primaryImage`, `images`, prices, `category`, `restaurant` snippet, â€¦)
- `modifierGroups` â€” array of `{ id, restaurantId, name, isRequired, minSelections, maxSelections, modifiers[] }`

response.name: 200 OK â€” product + modifiers

request.description:
Add line item to restaurant cart (Sanctum).

**Status**: `201 Created` | `422` validation

**Body**: `productId` (required); `quantity` (default 1); `modifierIds`; `substituteProductId`; `specialInstructions`.

**Response**: `message`, `cartId`, `itemId`.

Vote builder catalog (public).

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Query**: `search`, `cuisineTypeId`, `limit` (max 50).

**Response**:
- `durationMinutesPresets` â€” int[]
- `cuisineTypes` â€” `{ id, name, slug }[]`
- `suggestions` â€” `{ id, name, unitPrice, restaurantId, restaurantName }[]`

Create group vote (creator = auth user).

**Status**: `201 Created` | `422`

**Body**: `durationMinutes` âˆˆ presets; optional `foodCategoryHint`, `cuisineTypeId`; `options` 2â€“10 items `{ label, productId? }`.

**Response**: `message`, `data` â€” same shape as **Show group vote** (`vote`, `options`, `voters`, `winner`).

response.name: 201 Created â€” vote

request.description:
Public vote state (refreshed for live UI).

**Status**: `200 OK` | `404`

**Response**: `{ "data": { "vote", "options", "voters", "winner" } }` â€” see create-vote example; `winner` set when `status` is `ended`.

response.name: 200 OK â€” vote state

request.description:
Cast or change ballot (one per user per vote).

**Status**: `200 OK` | `422` if vote closed / invalid option.

**Body**: `{ "optionId": number }`

**Response**: `message`, `data` (updated payload).

item.name: End vote now â€” creator only (requires token)

request.description:
End vote early (creator only).

**Status**: `200 OK` | `422` if not creator or already ended.

**Response**: `message`, `data` with `vote.status` = `ended` and `winner` when applicable.

Checkout: create restaurant order from cart.

**Status**: `201 Created` | `422` business/validation errors

**Body**: `restaurantId`; `orderType` `delivery`|`pickup`; optional `pickupMode`, `pickupScheduledFor`, `promoCode`, `specialInstructions`.

**Response**: `message`, `order` â€” `OrderResource` (totals, `status`, `statusLabelAr`, `orderItems`, `restaurant`, â€¦).

Paginated restaurant orders for auth user.

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Response**: `data[]` of `OrderResource` (`links`, `meta`); default `perPage` 20 in controller.

Single restaurant order (`OrderResource`) for auth user.

**Status**: `200 OK` | `404` if not owned.

**Response**: Laravel single-resource wrapper `{ "data": OrderResource }`.

Home «عروض استثنائية»: عروض السوبرماركت المميزة للواجهة.

**Query (اختياري):**
- `latitude`, `longitude`
- `limit` (1–30, الافتراضي 10)

**Response:**
- `offers[]`:
  - `id`, `name`, `description`, `offerType`
  - `discountPercent`, `discountValue`, `badgeText`, `imageUrl`
  - `store { id, name, cover, logo }`
  - `startsAt`, `endsAt`, `isActive`

    "offers":  [

request.description:
Home «متاجر قريبة منك»: بطاقات متاجر السوبرماركت القريبة.

**Query (اختياري):**
- `latitude`, `longitude`
- `limit` (1–30, الافتراضي 15)

**Headers (اختياري):**
- `Authorization: Bearer {{token}}`
  - عند التوثيق: `isFavorited` محسوبة من المفضلة.

**Response:**
- `stores[]`:
  - `id`, `name`, `slug`, `cover`, `logo`, `rating`
  - `categoryNames[]`, `categorySummary`
  - `distanceKm`, `distanceUnit`
  - `estimatedDeliveryMinutesMin`, `estimatedDeliveryMinutesMax`
  - `discountOfferBadge`, `isMostRequested`, `popularOrdersCount`
  - `isFavorited`, `deliveryFee`, `isFreeDelivery`, `currency`

response.name: 200 OK â€” nearby stores
response.body:
{
    "stores":  [
                   {
                       "id":  1,
                       "estimatedDeliveryMinutesMax":  30,
                       "popularOrdersCount":  12,

                                             "مخبوزات",

                       "deliveryFee":  null,
                       "isMostRequested":  true,
                       "cover":  "https://example.com/sm/atrash/cover.jpg",
                       "name":  "سوبر ماركت الأطرش",
                       "distanceUnit":  "km",
                       "rating":  4.5
                   }
               ]
}

request.description:
Browse stores (paginated). Uses `SmStoreFilterRequest`.

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Query**: `perPage` (default 20), `search`, `filter.*`, `sort` â€” see `Modules/Supermarket` filter rules.

**Response**: Laravel pagination + `SmStoreResource` in `data[]` (`links`, `meta`).

response.name: 200 OK â€” paginated stores

request.description:
Search and browse supermarket products from active stores with available inventory.

Status: 200 OK.

Query props: perPage, page, search.

Returns: paginated SmProductResource in data[] with links and meta.

Get detailed information about a specific supermarket store.

**Status**: `200 OK` | `404` if store not found or inactive

**Response**: `{ "data": SmStoreResource }` with full store details (owner, categories, ratings, etc.)

Get detailed information about a specific supermarket product.

**Status**: `200 OK` | `404` if product not found or unavailable

**Response**: `{ "data": SmProductResource }` with full product details (store, price, stock, media, etc.)

Returns products whose title/name matches the selected product title (similar products list).

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Path prop**: `productId`

**Response**: paginated `SmProductResource` in `data[]` with links/meta. The selected product itself is excluded.

ØµÙ†Ø¯ÙˆÙ‚ Ø§Ù„Ø­Ø¸ â€” static restriction labels + supermarket category type options.

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Response**:
- `restrictions[]` â€” `{ "value": string, "labelAr": string }`
- `categoryTypes[]` â€” `{ "id": number, "name": string }`

ØµÙ†Ø¯ÙˆÙ‚ Ø§Ù„Ø­Ø¸ â€” suggests up to three bundles: `best_value`, `fastest`, `balanced`.

**Status**: `200 OK` (may return empty `bundles` if no match).

**Body**: `groupSize`, `budgetPerPerson` (required); `restrictions[]`, `latitude`, `longitude`, `searchRadiusKm`, `categoryId`, `storeId` optional.

**Response**:
- `budget` â€” `groupSize`, `budgetPerPerson`, `total`
- `bundles[]` â€” `label`, `labelAr`, `store` (`id`, `name`, `slug`, `logo`, `cover`), `totalProducts`, `itemsDescription`, `totalPrice`, `estimatedMinutes`, `lineItems[]` (`productId`, `name`, `quantity`, `unitPrice`, `lineTotal`, **`imageUrl`**)

response.name: 200 OK â€” bundle suggestions

item.name: Items (requires token)

request.description:
Paginated supermarket customer items (cart items).

**Auth**: `Authorization: Bearer {{token}}`

**Status**: `200 OK`

Add an item to a supermarket cart.

**Auth**: `Authorization: Bearer {{token}}`

**Status**: `201 Created`

Show a single cart item.

**Auth**: `Authorization: Bearer {{token}}`

**Status**: `200 OK` | `404 Not Found`

Update a cart item (quantity / unitPrice).

**Auth**: `Authorization: Bearer {{token}}`

**Status**: `200 OK`

Remove a cart item.

**Auth**: `Authorization: Bearer {{token}}`

**Status**: `204 No Content`

item.description: CRUD for supermarket items (cart items) under the user module supermarket prefix.

request.description:
Supermarket order tracking for the authenticated customer.

**Status**: `200 OK` | `404` if order not found or not owned.

**Headers**: `Authorization: Bearer {{token}}`

**Response**:
- `order` â€” `SmOrderResource` with `items` (product + media when loaded), `statusLogs`, `store`, amounts, `status`, `orderNumber`, â€¦

Home «عروض استثنائية»: عروض السوبرماركت المميزة للواجهة.

**Query (اختياري):**
- `latitude`, `longitude`
- `limit` (1–30, الافتراضي 10)

**Response:**
- `offers[]`:
  - `id`, `name`, `description`, `offerType`
  - `discountPercent`, `discountValue`, `badgeText`, `imageUrl`
  - `store { id, name, cover, logo }`
  - `startsAt`, `endsAt`, `isActive`

Home «متاجر قريبة منك»: بطاقات متاجر السوبرماركت القريبة.

**Query (اختياري):**
- `latitude`, `longitude`
- `limit` (1–30, الافتراضي 15)

**Headers (اختياري):**
- `Authorization: Bearer {{token}}`
  - عند التوثيق: `isFavorited` محسوبة من المفضلة.

**Response:**
- `stores[]`:
  - `id`, `name`, `slug`, `cover`, `logo`, `rating`
  - `categoryNames[]`, `categorySummary`
  - `distanceKm`, `distanceUnit`
  - `estimatedDeliveryMinutesMin`, `estimatedDeliveryMinutesMax`
  - `discountOfferBadge`, `isMostRequested`, `popularOrdersCount`

Browse active supermarket stores.

Status: 200 OK.

Query props: perPage, page, search, and optional filter/sort props supported by backend filters.

Returns: paginated SmStoreResource in data[] with links and meta.

Get detailed information about a specific supermarket store.

**Status**: `200 OK` | `404` if store not found or inactive

**Response**: `{ "data": SmStoreResource }` with full store details

Search and browse supermarket products from active stores with available inventory.

Status: 200 OK.

Query props: perPage, page, search.

Returns: paginated SmProductResource in data[] with links and meta.

Get detailed information about a specific supermarket product.

**Status**: `200 OK` | `404` if product not found or unavailable

**Response**: `{ "data": SmProductResource }` with full product details

Returns products whose title/name matches the selected product title (similar products list).

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Path prop**: `productId`

**Response**: paginated `SmProductResource` in `data[]` with links/meta. The selected product itself is excluded.

Get luck-box options catalogs.

Status: 200 OK.

Returns: restrictions[] ({ value, labelAr }) and categoryTypes[] ({ id, name }).

Generate supermarket luck-box bundle suggestions.

Status: 200 OK (bundles may be empty) or 422 validation.

Body props: groupSize and budgetPerPerson required; restrictions, latitude, longitude, searchRadiusKm, categoryId, storeId optional.

Enum values: bundle label is best_value | fastest | balanced.

Returns: budget object and bundles[] with store summary and lineItems[].

List favorite supermarket stores for the authenticated user.

Auth: Bearer token.

Status: 200 OK.

Query props: perPage, page.

Returns: paginated SmStoreResource in data[] with links/meta, newest favorite first.

Add a supermarket store to favorites (idempotent).

Auth: Bearer token.

Path prop: storeId.

Status: 201 first add, 200 if already favorited, 422 if store is inactive.

Returns: { "store": SmStoreResource }.

Remove a supermarket store from favorites.

Auth: Bearer token.

Path prop: storeId.

Status: 204 No Content.

Returns: empty body.

List favorite supermarket products for the authenticated user.

Auth: Bearer token.

Status: 200 OK.

Query props: perPage, page.

Returns: paginated SmProductResource in data[] with links/meta, newest favorite first.

Add a supermarket product to favorites (idempotent).

Auth: Bearer token.

Path prop: productId.

Status: 201 first add, 200 if already favorited, 422 if product unavailable or store inactive.

Returns: { "product": SmProductResource }.

Remove a supermarket product from favorites.

Auth: Bearer token.

Path prop: productId.

Status: 204 No Content.

Returns: empty body.

List supermarket cart items for current user.

Auth: Bearer token.

Status: 200 OK.

Query props: perPage, page.

Returns: paginated item resources in data[] with links/meta.

Create a supermarket cart item.

Auth: Bearer token.

Status: 201 Created or 422 validation.

Body props: cartId, productId, quantity required; unitPrice optional by backend rules.

Returns: created item payload.

Show one supermarket cart item.

Auth: Bearer token.

Path prop: smCartItemId.

Status: 200 OK or 404 Not Found.

Returns: single item payload.

Replace supermarket cart item fields (full update).

Auth: Bearer token.

Path prop: smCartItemId.

Status: 200 OK, 422 validation, or 404.

Body props: full payload for supported fields such as quantity and unitPrice.

Returns: updated item payload.

Partially update supermarket cart item fields.

Auth: Bearer token.

Path prop: smCartItemId.

Status: 200 OK, 422 validation, or 404.

Body props: only changed fields such as quantity.

Returns: updated item payload.

Delete a supermarket cart item.

Auth: Bearer token.

Path prop: smCartItemId.

Status: 204 No Content.

Returns: empty body.

Track supermarket order status for the authenticated customer.

Auth: Bearer token.

Path prop: orderId.

Status: 200 OK or 404 if not found/not owned.

Returns: { "order": SmOrderResource } with items, status logs, and totals.
